nasb.text: They *dressed Him up in purple, and after twisting a crown of thorns, they put it on Him;

esv.text: And they clothed him in a purple cloak, and twisting together a crown of thorns, they put it on him.

cnv.text: 他們給他披上紫色的外袍，又用荊棘編成冠冕給他戴上；

ccb.text: 他们给祂穿上紫袍，用荆棘编成王冠戴在祂头上，

csbs.text: 他们给他穿上紫色袍子，套上用荆棘编的冠冕，
